ALOO.TITLE: Aloo Assistants
ALOO.DESCRIPTION: Create and manage AI assistants for your inboxes

EMPTY_STATE.TITLE: No assistants yet
EMPTY_STATE.DESCRIPTION: Create your first AI assistant to automate customer conversations

WIZARD.TITLE: Create New Assistant
WIZARD.STEP_1_DESCRIPTION: Enter the basic information for your AI assistant
WIZARD.STEP_2_DESCRIPTION: Configure how your assistant communicates with customers
WIZARD.STEP_3_DESCRIPTION: Upload documents to build your assistant's knowledge base
WIZARD.STEP_1_BODY: Enter the name and description for your AI assistant
WIZARD.STEP_3_BODY: Upload documents to build the knowledge base
WIZARD.STEP_4_BODY: Select which inboxes will use this assistant

PERSONALITY_DESCRIPTION.LABEL: Personality Description
PERSONALITY_DESCRIPTION.PLACEHOLDER: Describe the personality traits and behavior of your assistant

DOCUMENTS.TITLE: Knowledge Base Documents
DOCUMENTS.DROP_FILES: Drop files here or click to upload

EMPTY_STATE.TITLE: No documents uploaded
EMPTY_STATE.DESCRIPTION: Upload documents to build your assistant's knowledge base

DELETE_CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete Document
DELETE_CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.

INBOXES.TITLE: Assign to Inboxes
INBOXES.DESCRIPTION: Select which inboxes this assistant should respond to

GENERAL.TITLE: General Settings
GENERAL.DESCRIPTION: Configure the basic settings for your AI assistant

PERSONALITY.TITLE: Personality Settings
PERSONALITY.DESCRIPTION: Configure how your assistant communicates with customers

DOCUMENTS.TITLE: Documents
DOCUMENTS.DESCRIPTION: Upload and manage documents that form your assistant's knowledge base

MEMORIES.TITLE: Learned Memories
MEMORIES.DESCRIPTION: View and manage memories the assistant has learned from conversations
MEMORIES.EMPTY: No memories learned yet. The assistant will learn from conversations over time.

PERFORMANCE.TITLE: Performance Metrics
PERFORMANCE.DESCRIPTION: Key performance indicators for your assistant

CONVERSATIONS.TITLE: Recent Conversations
CONVERSATIONS.EMPTY: No conversations yet. The assistant will appear here once it starts handling customer conversations.

STATS.TITLE: Assistant Statistics
STATS.EMPTY: Statistics will be available once the assistant starts handling conversations.

DELETE_CONFIRM.TITLE: Delete Assistant
DELETE_CONFIRM.MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this assistant? All associated documents and memories will be permanently deleted.

MESSAGES.ERROR: An error occurred. Please try again.

PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.TITLE: Preview
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.DESCRIPTION: See how your assistant will respond based on the current settings
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.SAMPLE_MESSAGE: Hello! How can I help you today?
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.SAMPLE_RESPONSE_PROFESSIONAL: Good day. I'm here to assist you with any questions you may have. How may I be of service today?
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.SAMPLE_RESPONSE_FRIENDLY: Hey there! Great to hear from you! What can I help you with today?
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.SAMPLE_RESPONSE_CASUAL: Hi! What's up? How can I help?
PERSONALITY_PREVIEW.SAMPLE_RESPONSE_FORMAL: Greetings. I am at your disposal to address any inquiries you may have. Please proceed with your request.
